data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan and Eastern Sabah until 1:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan dan Sabah Timur sehingga 1:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, northern part of Condore and southwestern part of Bunguran until 1:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Tioman, utara Condore dan barat daya Bunguran sehingga 1:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kelantan  (Kota Bharu, Bachok, Machang and Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu  (Kemaman);  Pahang  (Jerantut, Temerloh, Maran and Kuantan);  Sarawak:  Limbang (Lawas); and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan and Keningau), West Coast (Ranau) and Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran and Sandakan) until 11:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kelantan  (Kota Bharu, Bachok, Machang dan Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu  (Kemaman);  Pahang  (Jerantut, Temerloh, Maran dan Kuantan);  Sarawak:  Limbang (Lawas); dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan dan Keningau), Pantai Barat (Ranau) dan Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran dan Sandakan) sehingga 11:00 malam; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
